data.title: Dell beats Q2 targets but stocks drop due to mixed outlook for future; guidance affected Dell's market position.
data.description: In its fiscal second quarter, Dell Technologies exceeded expectations, but it provided uncertain guidance for the present period, causing a decline in Dell's stock. The company's performance exceeded market forecasts, yet its future outlook was met with varied reactions, resulting in a drop in stock value.

data.title: NexGold has engaged ICP Securities Inc. for automated market making services at a monthly fee of $7,500 for a 4-month term.
data.description: NexGold Mining Corp. has enlisted ICP Securities Inc. to provide automated market making services using its ICP Premium™ algorithm. The agreement, starting Aug. 28, 2025, is for an initial four-month term with automatic renewal for subsequent one-month terms unless either party provides at least thirty days’ notice. ICP will be compensated $7,500 monthly, plus taxes, with no performance factors or additional stock options included in the agreement. It is important to note that ICP and its clients may acquire an interest in NexGold's securities in the future.

data.title: Skechers and 3G Capital receive all regulatory approvals for acquisition, set to close on Sept 12, 2025.
data.description: Skechers U.S.A., Inc. and 3G Capital Partners L.P. have revealed that all necessary regulatory green lights for the acquisition of Skechers by 3G Capital have been obtained. The completion date for this transaction is set for September 12, 2025. The deal, valued at approximately $XX billion, is subject to meeting standard closing requirements outlined in the agreement between the two parties.

data.title: Research: African ebony trees rely on elephants; future guitar fingerboards linked to elephant conservation.
data.description: A recent study released in Science Advances reveals the crucial relationship between African ebony trees and elephants, emphasizing the significant role elephants play in the survival of these trees. The research suggests that the future availability of African ebony for guitar fingerboards could be at risk if elephant conservation efforts are not prioritized. Conducted over nearly ten years, the study underscores the importance of community-led conservation initiatives. The findings, which were made public in El Cajon, Calif., on August 28, 2025, stress the pressing need to protect elephants to ensure the sustainability of African ebony trees for various industries, including instrument manufacturing.

data.title: Marvell Technology Q2 FY2026 earnings call: Record revenue $2.006B, 58% YoY growth; data center revenue up 69%. Non-GAAP EPS $0.67, 123% YoY growth. Cash flow $462M. Divestiture of auto Ethernet business for $2.5B in all-cash transaction. Custom Silicon Investor event highlights $94B data center TAM for 2028. Leading in AI and cloud markets, strong demand for XPU products. Leadership promotions for growth in AI and cloud markets. Enterprise networking and carrier infrastructure revenue up 43%.EXPECTS Q3 revenue $2.06B, 36% YoY growth. Earnings call transcript available.
data.description: Marvell Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) reported its second-quarter results with record revenue of $2.006 billion, a 6% sequential increase, and 58% year-over-year growth. The data center end market showed strong momentum, growing 69% year over year. The non-GAAP operating margin increased by 870 basis points to 34.8%, with record non-GAAP earnings per share of $0.67, up 123% year over year. Operating cash flow rose to $462 million. Marvell completed the sale of its automotive Ethernet business for $2.5 billion in an all-cash transaction, allowing for further investment in its data center focus. The company aims to grow its data center market share from 13% to 20% by 2028. Marvell's revenue is expected to reach $2.06 billion in the third quarter, representing a 36% year-over-year growth excluding automotive Ethernet revenue. The company's AI-driven data center end market and recovery in other sectors are expected to drive continued growth. Data center revenue is forecasted to continue a strong mid-30% growth range in the third quarter. Marvell has promoted two leaders to enhance its focus on AI and cloud markets. The company's gross margin was 59.4%, with non-GAAP operating margin at 34.8%. Non-GAAP earnings per diluted share grew by 123% to $0.67, demonstrating significant operating leverage in Marvell's model. Operating cash flow reached $462 million in the second quarter, indicating robust financial performance for the company.

data.description: Curious about the current happenings in the cryptocurrency world? Stay updated with the most recent developments affecting the price of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies, as well as trends in blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3, and regulatory changes.

data.title: Metropolitan Water District doubles turf rebate for non-residential properties to $7 per sq ft for sustainable landscaping.
data.description: In Los Angeles, starting September 1st, the Metropolitan Water District is doubling its financial support for Southern California businesses, schools, HOAs, and other institutions that switch from water-intensive grass to eco-friendly landscaping. The turf replacement rebate for non-residential properties is being raised to $7 per square foot of grass removed, the highest amount in the region. This increase aims to incentivize more sustainable practices and help in conserving water resources.

data.title: FTT price tests $0.87 support with bearish MACD signals and neutral RSI amid Bollinger Band lower boundary test.
data.description: The current price of FTT remains steady at $0.87 amidst bearish signals from the MACD indicator and a neutral RSI reading. It is currently testing key support levels near the lower boundary of the Bollinger Bands.

data.title: Seeweb launches Regolo.ai, a new AI inference platform to simplify AI development globally, ensuring transparency, scalability, and data security.
data.description: Seeweb, based in Milano, Italy, has unveiled a new product called Regolo.ai, an innovative open AI inference platform aimed at streamlining AI development worldwide. This platform boasts open-source utilities, a transparent structure, and prioritizes data security, aiming to transform the process of building and implementing AI applications. Regolo.ai provides a sustainable and scalable option in contrast to conventional AI infrastructure, emphasizing accessibility, efficiency, and security. By eliminating restrictions typically associated with AI development, the platform aims to redefine the standards of AI deployment.
